name: Hacker News
description: Y Combinator's social news site for tech, startups, and science. The frontpage of the internet for developers and founders.

name: The Verge
description: Top-tier technology and culture journalism. Covers gadgets, AI, science, and the intersection of tech and everyday life.

name: BBC News
description: Trusted global news from the UK's public broadcaster. Comprehensive world coverage spanning politics, business, science, and culture.

name: Reuters
description: Straight-to-the-point global news wire. Reuters is a primary source for financial markets, geopolitics, and breaking world news.

name: TechCrunch
description: Breaking news and analysis on startups, venture capital, and the tech industry. Essential reading for the startup ecosystem.

name: Ars Technica
description: In-depth technology journalism with rigorous editorial standards. Long-form features on hardware, software, science, and policy.

name: Al Jazeera
description: Qatar-based international news network offering underrepresented perspectives on global events, especially the Middle East and Africa.

name: Feedly
description: Smart RSS reader that aggregates news from any website or blog. Use AI to filter out noise and surface what actually matters to you.

name: Techmeme
description: Auto-curated tech news aggregator. See the most-discussed tech stories from hundreds of sources at a glance.

name: Ground News
description: Compare how left, centre, and right-leaning outlets cover the same story. Fight bias by reading all sides.

name: NPR
description: Non-profit public radio news with in-depth reporting on politics, culture, and science. Strong audio journalism and podcasts.

name: Axios
description: Concise, no-fluff news in a smart-brevity format. Get the key facts on politics, tech, and business in seconds.

name: The Guardian
description: Independent British journalism with strong investigative reporting. Free to read with no hard paywall.

name: Bloomberg
description: Financial markets, business, and economic news with real-time data. The standard source for institutional investors.

name: AP News
description: The Associated Press wire service — fast, neutral, fact-first reporting used as a source by most other outlets.

name: Politico
description: In-depth US political journalism and policy coverage, widely read inside Washington D.C. itself.

name: Vox
description: Explanatory journalism that breaks down complex news topics into accessible, well-researched articles.

name: Wired
description: Technology and culture journalism covering science, gadgets, and the future of how we live and work.
